[**`@react-color`**](https://uiwjs.github.io/react-color).\n\n<!--rehype:ignore:start-->\n[![react-color-circle](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1680273/125948967-87e1d2eb-ed51-46c8-9378-9bf964b093ea.png)](https://uiwjs.github.io/react-color/#/circle)\n<!--rehype:ignore:end-->\n\n## Install\n\n```bash\nnpm i @uiw/react-color-circle\n```\n\n## Usage\n\n```jsx mdx:preview\nimport React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport Circle from '@uiw/react-color-circle';\n\nexport default function Demo() {\n  const [hex, setHex] = useState('#F44E3B');\n  return (\n    <Circle\n      colors={[ '#F44E3B', '#FE9200', '#FCDC00', '#DBDF00' ]}\n      color={hex}\n      onChange={(color) => {\n        setHex(color.hex);\n      }}\n    />\n  );\n}\n```\n\nModify point style\n\n```jsx mdx:preview\nimport React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport Circle from '@uiw/react-color-circle';\n\nexport default function Demo() {\n  const [hex, setHex] = useState('#F44E3B');\n  return (\n    <Circle\n      colors={[\n        '#f44336',\n        '#e91e63',\n        '#9c27b0',\n        '#673ab7',\n        '#3f51b5',\n        '#2196f3',\n      ]}\n      color={hex}\n      style={{\n        gap: 23\n      }}\n      rectProps={{\n        style: {\n          borderRadius: 2,\n          width: 18,\n          height: 18,\n        }\n      }}\n      pointProps={{\n        style: {\n          width: 26,\n          height: 26,\n          borderRadius: 5\n        },\n      }}\n      onChange={(color) => {\n        setHex(color.hex);\n      }}\n    />\n  );\n}\n```\n\n## Props\n\n```ts\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { HsvaColor, ColorResult } from '@uiw/color-convert';\nimport { SwatchProps } from '@uiw/react-color-swatch';\nexport interface CircleProps extends Omit<SwatchProps, 'color' | 'onChange'> {\n  color?: string | HsvaColor;\n  onChange?: (color: ColorResult) => void;\n  pointProps?: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>;\n}\ndeclare const Circle: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<CircleProps & React.RefAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>;\nexport default Circle;\n```\n\n<!--footer-dividing-->\n\n## Contributors\n\nAs always, thanks to our amazing contributors!\n\n<a
